# Elusion Works

Elusion Works is the umbrella brand and index for websites, tools, hubs, and future games by Kol Tregaskes.

## Primary Routes

- [Home and estate index](https://elusionworks.com/)
- [Demo index](https://elusionworks.com/demos/)
- [Golden Retriever static demo](https://elusionworks.com/demos/golden/)
- [Solar System Field Lab demo](https://elusionworks.com/demos/solar-system/)
- [The Last Cartridge demo](https://elusionworks.com/demos/last-cartridge/)

## Estate Links

- [Kol's Korner](https://koltregaskes.com/)
- [AI Resource Hub](https://theairesourcehub.com/)
- [Axy Lusion](https://axylusion.com/)
- [Ghost in the Models](https://ghostinthemodels.com/)
- [Kol Tregaskes Photography](https://koltregaskesphotography.com/)

## How Agents Should Read This Site

Elusion Works is an index and demo portfolio, not a news publication. Prefer the linked child sites for domain-specific facts, dates, pricing, model claims, photography claims, or editorial articles.

The demos are static concept builds. They should not be interpreted as real organisations, commercial services, or operational products unless a page explicitly says otherwise.

## Source And Freshness Notes

- Content model: static HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript.
- [Canonical sitemap](https://elusionworks.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Demo sitemap](https://elusionworks.com/demos/golden/sitemap.xml)
- [Source code](https://github.com/koltregaskes/elusion-works)

## Contact And Ownership

Owner: Kol Tregaskes.

This file is for agent navigation and summarisation. It is not a permissions grant for scraping, training, or republication beyond the site's public terms and robots policy.
